title: A Multicore Path to Connectomics-on-Demand
journal: PPoPP (ACM SIGPLAN Symposium on Principles and Practice of Parallel Programming)
abstract: We show that the benefits of algorithms, parallelization, and performance engineering can be so vast that 'cluster-scale' connectomics problems can be solved on a single commodity multicore machine. Best Paper Nominee.
notes: Demonstrated single-machine connectomics processing; Best Paper Nominee.
